ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-15-2015 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2015 Continued To Nov-03-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2015 Set For Order To Show Cause On Sep-01-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Jill Bates-Moore, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. Counsel represented to the court that the settlement fell apart. The court vacated the Notice of Settlement at plaintiff's request. The case is set on an Order to Show Cause for Sep-01-2015 at 10:30 AM in Department 610 for filing of Default. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)
